{{Infobox artifact
| name = VC-21 chaos rifle
| introduced = The Captain
}}

== The Captain ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[VC-21 chaos rifle]] fires both plasma bolts and magically accelerated bullets to overwhelm shields.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c3">''The Captain'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== The Engineer ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The narrator uses a [[VC-21 chaos rifle]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c47">''The Engineer'', chapter 47</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The narrator uses a chaos rifle.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c48">''The Engineer'', chapter 48</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== The Pilot ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[VC-U6 Rainbringer]] is a portable variant of the chaos rifle.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c39">''The Pilot'', chapter 39</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon artifacts]]
